18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm; Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance
18.extractionRationale: One distinct third-party accessory product identified: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit (44mm) explicitly designed for Clik Valve. The title and description clearly indicate this is a valve stem kit accessory compatible with Clik valves.

27.evidenceText: Four distinct product URLs identified: p1960182.html (Schlauch No. 19), p1859956.html (DV-SCV 2 Ventile & Pumpenkopfadapter), p1859949.html (Tubeless-Ventil 60mm), p1859948.html (Tubeless-Ventil 40mm)
27.extractionRationale: Counted unique product page URLs (those with /p[number].html format). The category page (f.serie.schwalbe-clik-valve) was excluded as it is a filter/collection page, not an individual product page. Four distinct products identified from the evidence provided.

30.evidenceText: All 5 product listings reviewed (Clik Valve 40mm, 60mm, 80mm, Conversion Kit, and series page) contain only product descriptions without any stock status information
30.extractionRationale: Stock status cannot be determined from the provided sources. None of the 5 listings mention out-of-stock, unavailable, or similar status indicators. The text provided appears to be incomplete product descriptions without availability information.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: The source page mentions a "Spare parts" section but the actual content listing specific SKUs for valve cores, seals, o-rings, or replacement kits is not provided in the available evidence.
37.extractionRationale: The evidence indicates a "Spare parts" section exists on the BBB Cycling page, but the specific SKU data needed to count distinct replacement parts (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) is not included in the provided content excerpt.

41.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling reckons its new CoreCap valve that works 'with almost ...
41.evidenceText: Schwalbe has entered the space with its Clik Valve, aiming to make tyre inflation easier and more efficient through simpler
41.extractionRationale: The source only confirms Schwalbe's Clik valve launch but provides no data on 2026 brand adoptions or 2027 continuation rates. No specific adoption metrics or model year specifications are available in the evidence.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss offers tubeless valves in alloy black and brass silver options for various profile heights. No mention of Clik valve adoption. Sources indicate DT Swiss uses proprietary DT Swiss tubeless valve system.
45.extractionRationale: Based on available evidence, DT Swiss (one of the six major brands specified) uses their own proprietary tubeless valve system, not Clik valve. No evidence of Clik adoption was found in the provided sources, and no information was available about the other five brands (Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) or their 2026/2027 product lines. Therefore, 0 out of 6 major brands have converted to Clik valve = 0%.

49.evidenceText: 2026 Bergamont Grandurance LTD lists "Clik valve" and 2026 Bergamont Grandurance 10 lists "Clik valve" in tube specifications. Trek models list "Herrmans Clik" which refers to grips, not valve type.
49.extractionRationale: Counted bicycle models that explicitly list "Clik valve" in their valve specifications. Two Bergamont models (2026 Grandurance LTD and 2026 Grandurance 10) have this specification. Trek models mention "Herrmans Clik" but this refers to handlebars/grips, not valves, so they were excluded from the count.

50.evidenceText: Three distinct pages identified: (1) https://www.schwalbe.com/fr/technique-faq/tubeless/ - Tubeless FAQ with Clik Valve instructions, (2) https://www.schwalbe.com/en/technology-faq/valve/ - Dedicated Valve/Clik Valve FAQ, (3) https://www.schwalbe.com/en/clik-valve/ - Dedicated Clik Valve product page
50.extractionRationale: Counted unique schwalbe.com URLs that are technical documents, installation guides, or FAQ pages specifically related to Clik Valve. Excluded product pages that merely mention Clik Valve (Airmax and Pro One pages). Three pages contain substantive Clik Valve technical information: the French Tubeless FAQ, English Valve FAQ, and dedicated Clik Valve page.

56.evidenceText: The evidence references Clik Valve products, conversion kits, and tubeless valves, but contains no information about inner tube models/SKUs using the Clik valve interface.
56.extractionRationale: The provided sources discuss the Clik Valve technology, tubeless valves, and accessories, but do not list or reference any specific inner tube models or SKUs that incorporate the Clik valve interface. Inner tubes are explicitly excluded from the tubeless valve products mentioned.

57.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern - blau | 2 Stück - BIKE24
57.evidenceText: Product listing for BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Ventilkern in various colors. No stock status or restock date information provided in the available content.
57.extractionRationale: The provided content does not contain explicit stock availability status, 'back in stock' dates, or restock turnaround time information. Without dates to calculate a gap or current availability confirmation, the turnaround time cannot be determined.

61.sourceTitle: Aluminum - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News - Trading Economics
61.evidenceText: Aluminum fell to 3468.50 USD/T on April 2, 2026
61.extractionRationale: The source directly states the aluminum price as 3468.50 USD/T (USD per metric ton). This is the current LME aluminum spot price as of April 2, 2026, already in the requested USD/metric ton format.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest (LUPc1) - Investing.com
62.evidenceText: The Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest price today is 1,793.99
62.extractionRationale: The evidence provides a numerical value of 1,793.99 but does not explicitly state whether this is in cents/lb or USD/lb. The evidence text appears truncated and lacks clear unit designation. Without confirmation of the unit, the value cannot be reliably converted to USD/lb as requested.
